generatedInterpretation: Estimated functional balance indicators suggest {status} during the {mode}. The result should be interpreted as rehabilitation-support information, not as a medical diagnosis.
recoLateralSway: High medial-lateral sway: consider lateral weight-shift and side-stepping control exercises.
recoAnteriorPosteriorSway: High anterior-posterior sway: include forward/backward control and ankle strategy exercises.
recoTrunkDeviation: Trunk deviation increased: add trunk stabilization and postural alignment exercises.
recoDynamicLimited: Dynamic score is limited: continue static/support-ring training before increasing difficulty.
recoEyesClosedInstability: Eyes-closed instability is present: consider proprioceptive training with safe therapist supervision.
recoStableIndicators: Current indicators are stable: progress difficulty gradually while maintaining therapist supervision.

aboutHeroTitle: Low-Cost Functional Balance Assessment and Rehabilitation Support Platform
projectOverviewText: BalanceRehab supports functional balance assessment and rehabilitation follow-up using a low-cost instrumented platform, computer vision, and explainable biomechanical indicators.
architectureText: Patient -> balance board, ultrasonic sensors, and webcam -> ESP32 -> BalanceRehab platform -> analysis, reports, progress tracking, and recommendations.
scoringText: Total Balance Score = 60% Board Stability + 40% Posture Stability.
educationalDisclaimer: This prototype is designed for educational and rehabilitation-support purposes only. It does not replace certified medical diagnosis or clinical decision-making.
disclaimer: Educational rehabilitation-support prototype. It does not replace certified medical diagnosis or clinical decision-making.

aboutShowcase.platformTitle: Functional Balance Assessment and Rehabilitation Platform
aboutShowcase.overviewDescription: BalanceRehab is a low-cost platform for functional balance assessment and rehabilitation support using computer vision, ESP32 acquisition, and clinical reporting.
problems: Falls are a major clinical issue
Balance impairment increases fall risk, reduces independence, and requires structured assessment and follow-up.
Certified posturography systems provide objective measurements but remain financially inaccessible for many educational and rehabilitation settings.
Objective tools are not widely available
Many clinics rely primarily on observation and clinical scales because instrumented balance assessment is unavailable.
solutions: MediaPipe-based body, face, and hand landmark acquisition.
Low-cost motion acquisition using four ultrasonic sensors.
Estimated balance, posture, stability, sway, and alignment measures.
Structured PDF output with scores, graphs, interpretation, and recommendations.
Body-controlled therapeutic exercises for guided balance training.
Longitudinal session history for clinical follow-up.
aboutShowcase.acquisitionDescription: Four ultrasonic sensors estimate board displacement around the support surface. The ESP32 acquires and transmits sensor values to the application, while the webcam captures patient posture through MediaPipe. The software combines available signals into functional balance indicators.
hardwareItems: Estimated board motion in multiple directions
Body, face, and hand landmark tracking
Safer constrained configuration for static testing
aboutShowcase.indicatorDescription: Estimated functional indicator used to support supervised interpretation.
exercises: Static stability, sway reduction, and postural endurance.
Movement precision, smoothness, and trajectory control.
Coordination, functional reach, and upper-limb control.
Reaction time, bilateral reach, and dual-task balance.
Anticipatory control, agility, and recovery speed.
aboutShowcase.disclaimer: BalanceRehab is an educational and rehabilitation-support prototype. Its estimated indicators do not replace certified medical posturography, professional clinical judgment, or diagnosis.
aboutShowcase.schematicCaption: Webcam posture tracking and low-cost board sensing combined inside one clinical workflow.

pdfEstimatedIndicatorLimit: The indicators presented are estimated from the webcam and/or ultrasonic sensors. They are not equivalent to a medical center-of-pressure measurement from a certified force platform.

rehabilitationWorkspace.recommendationBasis: based on the risk level and latest balance findings.

rehabilitationWorkspace.estimatedSupportNote: Scores are estimated from MediaPipe full-body and hand landmarks for rehabilitation support.
rehabilitationWorkspace.trajectoryControlDescription: Estimated balance marker trace for this exercise.

reasons.coordinatedReach: Build coordinated reach with a stable base.
reasons.improveStatic: Improve static control and reduce corrective sway.
reasons.improveTransfer: Improve controlled anterior-posterior and lateral transfer.
reasons.improveCoordination: Improve coordination and upper-limb control with a stable base.
reasons.improveTrajectory: Improve trajectory precision and movement smoothness.
reasons.lowScore: Global score below 72 — static control priority.

stability_challenge.title: Balance Freeze
stability_challenge.focus: Static balance · Sway reduction · Postural control
stability_challenge.description: Hold a steady stance while the system measures body-center drift and corrective movement.

weight_shift_trainer.title: Weight Shift Trainer
weight_shift_trainer.description: Transfer weight safely toward anterior, posterior, and lateral therapeutic targets.

path_following.title: Path Following
path_following.description: Guide the body-center marker along a smooth clinical path with precise movement.

balance_maze.title: Balance Maze
balance_maze.description: Navigate a therapeutic maze through deliberate multi-directional body shifts.

reach_touch.title: Reach & Touch
reach_touch.description: Reach to visual targets with either hand while maintaining a controlled standing base.

balloon_pop.title: Balloon Pop
balloon_pop.description: Touch time-limited targets to train upper-limb reactions without losing postural control.

squat_trainer.title: Squat Trainer
squat_trainer.focus: Lower-limb strength · Knee and hip control
squat_trainer.description: Practice controlled squat depth and return with pose-based hip and knee feedback.

single_leg_balance.title: Single-Leg Balance
single_leg_balance.description: Maintain one-foot support while controlling trunk and body-center movement.

obstacle_avoidance.title: Obstacle Avoidance
obstacle_avoidance.description: Shift away from incoming obstacles while preserving a safe, controlled standing base.

combinedFusionMethod: ESP32 board AP/ML sway drives the CoP-like trajectory; MediaPipe webcam samples remain separate posture indicators.
